subcodes.first_line: O ye near servants at the Threshold of the Blessed Beauty, render thanks unto God that ye are in the native land of His Holiness the Exalted One, may my spirit be sacrificed for Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان مقرب درگاه جمال مبارک شکر کنید خدا را که در موطن حضرت اعلی روحی له
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
